name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Orlando's US Cash Advance at 9 N Summerlin Ave offers quick payday loans and title loans with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
US Cash Advance's Orlando location sits at 9 N Summerlin Ave a1, serving the central Florida community with accessible payday and title loan services. Open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 9 PM, and Saturday through Sunday from 10 AM to 7 PM, this standalone storefront provides convenient hours for working professionals in and around Orlando who need quick access to emergency cash.

At this Orlando, FL branch, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and related financial products. The knowledgeable staff at the 9 N Summerlin Ave location can answer questions about loan terms, eligibility requirements, and the application process. Call +1 321-499-8172 to speak with someone at this Orlando location about your options.

If you're an Orlando resident facing an unexpected expense, this Summerlin Ave location offers a straightforward alternative to traditional banks and credit cards. Bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and a valid bank account to apply—the process is often completed within hours. US Cash Advance helps Orlando families bridge financial gaps with short-term lending solutions.
address: 9 N Summerlin Ave a1, Orlando, FL 32801

company_info.headquarters: 9 N Summerlin Ave a1, Orlando, FL 32801

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for approved applicants
In-person service at Detroit location with extended operating hours (8am–9pm weekdays)
Accepts all credit types, including bad credit, with no credit check loans available
No collateral required; unsecured loans available up to $50,000
Staff praised for transparency and clear explanation of repayment terms with no hidden fees reported
Fast approval process documented at under 45 minutes in-person
Flexible loan use—customers can use funds for any purpose
cons: APR rates and fee structures not disclosed on website; typical payday loan rates are 400%+ APR
Uses third-party lender connections, creating uncertainty about direct lending relationship and regulatory accountability
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area at physical location
No online pre-approval option mentioned; some customer reviews suggest this would speed up process
Regulatory compliance details (state licensing, disclosures, repayment terms) not provided on website
best_for: Consumers with bad credit who need emergency cash within 24 hours
In-person borrowers in Detroit who prefer face-to-face loan discussion and verification
Short-term cash needs ($100–$1,000) for unexpected expenses like medical bills or urgent repairs
Borrowers without collateral who cannot access traditional bank loans
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for consumers in the Detroit area who need emergency cash within 24 hours and have bad credit or limited traditional lending options. The main caveat is that payday and cash advance loans typically carry very high APR rates (400%+ annually); borrowers should carefully review all fees and repayment terms before committing, and the website's lack of rate disclosure is a red flag that requires clarification before applying.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit storefront
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 9 N Summerlin Ave, Orlando, FL. Quick payday and title loans with extended hours.
